requirement_topic.en: CRA Mandatory Radio / Telecom Terminal Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: CRA强制无线电/电信终端型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: CRA強制無線電/電信終端型號認證

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain CRA mandatory type approval under Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications before import or sale in Qatar. The CRA type approval certificate number must appear on the device label and packaging in both Arabic and English. Approval requires test reports from a CRA-accepted accredited laboratory. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, SRRC certificates, and CCC certification are not accepted as substitutes for CRA type approval. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) formally covers recognition among GCC member states (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman) but CRA type approval remains enforced as a national requirement in practice for all equipment imported into Qatar.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须依据卡塔尔2006年第34号电信法取得CRA强制型号认证，方可进口或在卡塔尔销售。设备标签及包装须以阿拉伯文和英文标注CRA型号认证证书编号。认证需提交经CRA认可的认可实验室出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID、SRRC证书及CCC认证均不可替代CRA型号认证。海湾合作委员会相互承认协议（GCC MRA）正式覆盖GCC成员国之间的相互承认，但CRA型号认证在实践中仍作为国家要求对所有进口至卡塔尔的设备强制执行。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須依據卡塔爾2006年第34號電信法取得CRA強制型號認證，方可進口或在卡塔爾銷售。設備標籤及包裝須以阿拉伯文和英文標注CRA型號認證證書編號。認證需提交經CRA認可的認可實驗室出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID、SRRC證書及CCC認證均不可替代CRA型號認證。海灣合作委員會相互承認協議（GCC MRA）正式涵蓋GCC成員國之間的相互承認，但CRA型號認證在實踐中仍作為國家要求對所有進口至卡塔爾的設備強制執行。

standards_or_laws: Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications
CRA Type Approval Procedures and Requirements
ETSI EN 300 328 v2 (2.4 GHz WLAN / Bluetooth)
GCC MRA for Telecommunications and IT Equipment

summary.en: In China, radio type approval for wireless devices is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) under the Regulations on Radio Administration. Telecom terminal equipment (devices connecting to public telecom networks) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 / GB/T 9254 covers electrical safety and EMC for products within the CCC catalogue.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）依据《无线电管理条例》负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）依据GB 4943.1/GB/T 9254涵盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全和EMC。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置的無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）依據《無線電管理條例》負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）依據GB 4943.1/GB/T 9254涵蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全和EMC。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: CRA type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Qatar CRA does not recognise SRRC approval, CCC certification, CE DoC, or FCC ID as satisfying its type approval requirement. While the GCC MRA provides a framework for mutual recognition among Gulf states, CRA type approval is enforced as a standalone national requirement in practice. A fresh CRA application with accredited-lab test reports, Arabic and English labelling, and the CRA certificate number on device and packaging is required for every model imported or sold in Qatar.
gap.zh: CRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。卡塔尔CRA不承认SRRC批准、CCC认证、CE DoC或FCC ID满足其型号认证要求。尽管GCC MRA为海湾国家间相互承认提供了框架，但CRA型号认证在实践中作为独立的国家要求强制执行。每款在卡塔尔进口或销售的产品均须重新提交CRA申请，附经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在设备和包装上以阿拉伯文和英文标注CRA证书编号。
gap.zht: CRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。卡塔爾CRA不承認SRRC批准、CCC認證、CE DoC或FCC ID滿足其型號認證要求。儘管GCC MRA為海灣國家間相互承認提供了框架，但CRA型號認證在實踐中作為獨立的國家要求強制執行。每款在卡塔爾進口或銷售的產品均須重新提交CRA申請，附經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在裝置和包裝上以阿拉伯文和英文標注CRA證書編號。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CRA type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Qatar under Law No. 34 of 2006. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. The CRA certificate number must appear in Arabic and English on device and packaging labels. The GCC MRA does not eliminate the need for national CRA approval in practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据2006年第34号法律，CRA型号认证对所有在卡塔尔进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。CRA证书编号须以阿拉伯文和英文标注于设备和包装标签。GCC MRA在实践中并不免除国家CRA认证的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據2006年第34號法律，CRA型號認證對所有在卡塔爾進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。CRA證書編號須以阿拉伯文和英文標注於裝置和包裝標籤。GCC MRA在實踐中並不免除國家CRA認證的要求。
